changePassword.title: Change Password
changePassword.description: Please enter your current password and new password.

validation.passwordMinLength: Password must be at least 5 characters
validation.newPasswordSameAsCurrent: New password cannot be the same as current password

forgotPassword.description: Please enter your registered username and Mobile number to reset your password.

passwordReset.title: Password Reset
passwordReset.description: Your password has been successfully reset. Click below to login.

otpVerification.title: OTP Verification
otpVerification.description: Please enter the OTP sent to the mobile number +{{phoneNumber}}

toastMessages.otpIdNotFound: OTP ID not found. Please request a new OTP.

newPassword.title: Set a New Password
newPassword.description: Create a new password. Ensure it differs from previous ones for security.

validation.passwordMinLength: Password must be at least 5 characters

step1.title: Step 1 — Mobile verification
step1.heading: Enter your mobile number
step1.description: Enter your Ethio Telecom number to get started with NameTAG. We will send a one-time verification code.
step1.mobile_error: Phone number must start with 9 and be 9 digits long (excluding country code)

step2.title: Step 2 — Fayda identity
step2.heading: Verify your identity with Fayda
step2.description: Please verify your identity with your national ID (Fayda) to continue registration. You will be redirected to the Fayda portal and returned here automatically once verified.
step2.after_text: After verification on the Fayda portal, you will be redirected back here and your registration form will be filled automatically.

step3.title: Step 3 — Registration
step3.heading: Complete your registration
step3.limit_error: You have exceeded the maximum number of verifications for the selected Fayda (NID). Please use a different mobile number or verify with another Fayda (NID) linked to your mobile number.
step3.auto_fill: Details auto-filled from your verified Fayda identity
step3.password_hint: Length 5-15 • one uppercase letter • one lowercase letter • one special character (@#$%&*)
